modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to hide rows or columns in Google Sheets.

full_description_text:  
I was trying to hide some rows and columns in Google Sheets, but I just couldn't figure it out. It seems like I’m missing something because every time I try, nothing happens. I really need to clean up my spreadsheet, and hiding those rows and columns would make it so much easier to read. Can someone help me with this?
